---
title: "Publications"
description: "Peer-reviewed publications."
bibliography: references.bib
nocite: |
  @*
---

See also my full list on
[{{< fa brands google >}} Google Scholar](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=YOUR_ID)  <!-- TODO: confirm -->
and [ORCID](https://orcid.org/0000-0000-0000-0000).  <!-- TODO: confirm -->

## Peer-reviewed

::: {#refs}
:::

<!--
To add a publication: append a BibTeX entry to references.bib and it will render here
automatically (nocite: @* lists everything in the file).
-->
